rules.action: presses {prop} close to the chest, partially concealing it in shadow
turns slightly away from the light, {prop} held loosely at one side
holds a controlled smile while {prop} flickers in the reflection
tries to hide tears as {prop} catches the cyber-pink rim light
breaks into motion, {prop} trailing light behind
stands still, fingers resting on {prop} as time seems suspended
reaches forward slowly, {prop} glowing between open hands
grips {prop} tight, shoulders tense, frame locked in controlled tension
looks slightly past the camera as {prop} pulses with stored light
drifts forward with {prop} trailing soft light above the grip
lets {prop} hang low, its light fragmenting across the floor
walks slowly forward, {prop} catching each passing neon light
holds a long gaze forward while {prop} rests quietly in the palm
opens the mouth slightly, {prop} vibrating with the vocal resonance
moves in clipped rhythmic steps, keeping {prop} close to the chest

default: shows the section emotion through posture, hand movement, and the recurring {prop}

Bridge.hide_action: mask finally slips, {prop} trembling as buried emotion breaks through the neon surface
Bridge.default_action: looks past the camera as long-held emotion surfaces, {prop} vibrating faintly with the vocal line

Outro.cry_action: lets the smile fall; {prop} dims as tears trace the neon edge into silence
Outro.default_action: slows to stillness, {prop} settling into the final graphite reflection

Chorus.smile_action: surges forward with {prop} raised, forced smile vivid against the neon light
Chorus.default_action: pushes forward through the brightest neon layer with {prop} leading the frame

Intro.music_cue_action: stands in controlled stillness, making a small hand gesture as {prop} begins to glow
